items.title: Email and SMS spam detection
items.description: Multinomial NB on word counts remains a fast, interpretable spam baseline; token log-odds highlight which words drive the spam label.

items.title: Document and news categorization
items.description: Routing articles into topics (sports, finance, politics) using count vectors scales to large corpora with minimal compute.

items.title: Sentiment and intent classification
items.description: Short user messages can use Bernoulli NB when presence of sentiment words matters more than repetition; product reviews often suit Multinomial NB.

items.title: Language identification
items.description: Character or word n-gram counts treated as multinomial features identify language quickly on small training sets.
